calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-001: harm_gradient_enabled vs binary-contact residue geography formation (GAP-10)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-10 closure. ARM_0: harm_gradient_enabled=False (binary contact only). ARM_1: harm_gradient_enabled=True, harm_gradient_scale=0.30. C1 gate: ARM_1 final mean_weight > 2x ARM_0 in >= 4/5 seeds. Coverage saturates (575a finding); mean_weight is the discriminating metric. PASS closes GAP-10 and unblocks ARC-013, DEV-NEED-004. Smoke PASS.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-004: novelty bonus Goldilocks calibration -- MECH-111 broadcast weight sweep (infant_substrate:GAP-13)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-13 closure. Sweeps novelty_bonus_weight in [0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 1.0]. C1: signal active (mean_novelty_ema > 0.001 in >=2/3 seeds for any arm). C2: >=3/5 arms with mean_coverage > 0.05 in >=2/3 seeds. Goldilocks weight = arm with highest (norm_coverage + norm_H_pos) / 2. PASS unblocks infant curriculum Phase 1 weight adoption. Smoke PASS.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008.

items.title: MECH-090 V_s commit-release substrate validation (re-issue 481)
items.note: GAP-5 close: forced-commit substrate test; 3 UCs (ON, OFF, empty-snapshot). Smoke-test PASS 2026-05-17.

items.title: GAP-3 Option 2: drive_floor insatiability floor sweep (escalation from EXQ-582 FAIL)
items.note: EXQ-582 diagnostic grid row: No arm clears A1 (incl. 0.01) -> Escalate to Option 2. Sweeps drive_floor in {0.0, 0.3, 0.6, 0.9, 1.2} with drive_ema_alpha=1.0 (Option 1 OFF). First-PASS arm floor=0.9. goal_pipeline:GAP-3 closure gated on PASS.

items.title: GAP-11 pilot: committed-mode curriculum harness validation (EXP-0157)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-11 diagnostic pilot. 3 arms: EMERGENT (P0 warmup on easy env -> P2 eval on target), FORCED_RV (clone + forced rv=0.001 -> P2), STARVED (tight threshold=1e-4 -> abort gate fires at mid-probe). C1: emergent committed steps/ep>100 in >=2/3 seeds. C2: forced-rv committed steps/ep>100 all seeds. C3: starved arm aborts (abort_reason=commitment_not_elicited) all seeds. PASS unblocks V3-EXQ-460b/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b OCD battery. Supersedes V3-EXQ-461 (synthetic scripted diagnostic, 2026-05-12).

items.title: ARC-062 differential-heads cross-machine confirmation of 543i (ree-cloud-4)
items.note: Cross-machine CONFIRMATION of V3-EXQ-543i_20260518T191052Z (NOT a supersession; 543i stands, keeps its 543h/543g chain; manifest carries confirms=V3-EXQ-543i). Byte-identical to 543i in all executable code (config, thresholds, 12-arm design, phased training, acceptance logic); the ONLY varied factor vs 543i is the host machine. 543i FAILed branch e (MECH-309 supports / ARC-062 weakens: all 4 diff-ON gated arms 3/3 inert despite delta_hat L2 pinned to differential_bias_scale=0.1) on a SINGLE machine (Mac). The 543g->h->i chain exists because of a cross-machine bistability (ACTIVE host-A / INERT cloud-3+cloud-4); pinned to ree-cloud-4 (a participant in that divergent INERT basin) for the strongest single-variable confirmation. Branch e CONFIRMS-543i -> clears single-machine caveat, ARC-062 demotion + ARC-063/V4 governance can proceed; branch a CONTRADICTS-543i -> 543i was itself a single-machine basin artifact, do NOT demote ARC-062, escalate to /failure-autopsy + >=2-machine matrix; branch c NON-CONTRIBUTORY (diff-OFF did not reproduce collapse on this host -> drift). priority 5 (above current max 4): ARC-062/MECH-309 governance is gated on this. Smoke: dry-run PASS (36/36 verdicts, branch c as expected for 3-ep dry-run, identical to 543i dry-run; manifest+sentinel+identity fields verified).
